visual_description: A man in a suit rides a bicycle on a paved road, gesturing with his right hand while maintaining balance. A white Jeep drives alongside him, partially obscuring the view as it passes. The scene unfolds on a sunny day with rolling hills and sparse vegetation in the background.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and a neutral tone, speaking at a moderate pace with no noticeable inflection.
